description: An agent needs to process an order being shipped internationally, which requires customs documentation.

nodes.task_description: Receive a new order with an international shipping address.

expected_outcome.value: System identifies the order as international.

nodes.task_description: Calculate international shipping costs and any applicable duties or taxes.

expected_outcome.value: System correctly calculates the total cost for the customer.

nodes.task_description: Generate the necessary customs declaration forms (e.g., CN22) with product information and value.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates the required customs paperwork.
